readings.summary: They shall look on him whom they have pierced.

readings.citation:
Ps 63:2, 3–4, 5–6, 8–9
My soul is thirsting for you, O Lord my God.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 63:2, 3–4, 5–6, 8–9
My soul is thirsting for you, O Lord my God.

readings.summary: All of you who were baptized have clothed yourselves with Christ.

My sheep hear my voice, says the Lord;
I know them, and they follow me.
You are the Christ of God. The Son of Man must suffer greatly.

antiphons.text:
The Lord is the strength of his people,
a saving refuge for the one he has anointed.
Save your people, Lord, and bless your heritage,
and govern them for ever.

The eyes of all look to you, Lord,
and you give them their food in due season.

I am the Good Shepherd,
and I lay down my life for my sheep, says the Lord.
